name: Video Use
description: Conversation-driven video editor ported from github.com/browser-use/video-use - transcript-as-DOM, EDL render pipeline, ffmpeg-based cuts with 30ms fades, optional Whisper or ElevenLabs Scribe transcription.

settings.label: ElevenLabs API Key
settings.description: Optional. If set, transcription uses ElevenLabs Scribe (paid). Otherwise the plugin tries local Whisper (whisper-cli or whisper on PATH).

settings.label: ffmpeg executable
settings.description: Path to ffmpeg. Default 'ffmpeg' assumes it is on PATH.

settings.label: ffprobe executable
settings.description: Path to ffprobe. Default 'ffprobe' assumes it is on PATH.
